description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage called build. Add a job named build_project that runs in the build stage on runners tagged swift, nmea, parser. The job executes the following shell commands in order: `xcodebuild clean -project NMEAParser.xcodeproj -scheme NMEAParser | xcpretty`, `xcodebuild build -project NMEAParser.xcodeproj -scheme NMEAParser | xcpretty`, and `xcodebuild test -project NMEAParser.xcodeproj -scheme NMEAParser | xcpretty -s`. No Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
